name: agent-html-provider
responsibility: Tier 2 fallback DesignProvider. Generates HTML mockups by instructing Claude agent with designMd constraints. Quality target: correct base layout, coordinated color scheme, basic animation effects. Uses the same DesignProvider interface as StitchProvider.

api_detail.method: Spawn designer subagent with detailed designMd prompt. Agent writes HTML to /tmp, module reads it back.
Spawn N parallel designer subagents, each with different style direction prompt + shared designMd constraint
LLM analyzes the variant HTML to extract color palette, typography, spacing, border-radius, shadow, animation level
Returns a synthetic ref wrapping the designMd string. No external API call.
Stores the DesignSystemRef's designMd as the active constraint. All subsequent generateScreen/generateVariants calls include this designMd in their prompt. No external API call.
Always returns true — agent is always available as long as Claude Code is running

fields.name: designMdTemplate
fields.constraints: base design system markdown template for quality floor

fields.name: qualityChecklist
fields.constraints: ['correct base layout', 'coordinated color scheme', 'basic animation effects', 'responsive breakpoints', 'proper typography hierarchy']

nfr_constraints.performance: generateScreen < 120s (agent generation slower than Stitch). generateVariants < 300s for 5 variants (parallelized).
nfr_constraints.other: Quality floor: layout correct + colors coordinated + basic animation. Verified against qualityChecklist.
